tagline: Automated inventory management for automotive parts suppliers

challenge.headline: Spreadsheets can't keep up with multi-channel parts
challenge.description: Automotive parts suppliers were managing inventory, COGS, and financials manually across disconnected systems — leading to stock errors, duplicate data entry, and zero visibility into profitability. Sales, inventory, and financial data lived in separate silos with no unified view.

result.headline: Streamlined operations, confident growth
result.quote: HG Garage transformed inventory operations into a more streamlined and scalable process, empowering businesses to operate with greater confidence and efficiency.
